description: You are a platform engineer. The internal build orchestrator and dependency resolver for your company's 18-package monorepo is broken, causing CI pipeline failures including incorrect build ordering, rejected diamond dependency graphs, semantic versioning errors, and broken cache invalidation. Fix all 5 bugs across the resolver and scheduler modules in the codebase at /home/ga/workspace/buildsys/ so that the python3 test_build.py test suite passes completely.
